positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a celestial landscape. A crescent moon hangs above rolling hills stylized with geometric patterns. Swirling constellations formed by delicate dotted lines connect stylized planets—a Saturn-like ringed planet, a bright yellow star, and deep indigo gas giants. The composition should be centralized and balanced, emphasizing strong contrast between the deep midnight blue and the glowing, creamy white elements. The style is elegant, clean, single-color stencil graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on strong silhouettes and graphic readability. High contrast, vector aesthetic, perfectly symmetrical.
negative: photorealistic, painting, complex background, gradient, smudge, blur, text, logo, watermark, signature, noise, artifacts, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, busy, distressed
